items.definition_en: A tracksuit is a set of matching jacket and pants worn for sports.
items.example_en: He put on his tracksuit before heading out for a run.

items.definition_en: A sports bra is a supportive bra worn during exercise.
items.example_en: She wears a sports bra when she goes jogging.

items.definition_en: A football shirt is a team top worn by football players.
items.example_en: He bought a new football shirt for his favorite team.

items.definition_en: Joggers are comfortable pants for exercise or casual wear.
items.example_en: She wore joggers to the gym.

items.definition_en: Yoga pants are soft, stretchy pants for yoga or exercise.
items.example_en: Yoga pants are comfortable for stretching exercises.

items.definition_en: Gym shorts are light shorts worn for sports or exercise.
items.example_en: He wore gym shorts during his workout.

items.definition_en: A swimsuit is clothing worn while swimming.
items.example_en: She packed her swimsuit for the pool.

items.definition_en: Swimming trunks are shorts men wear for swimming.
items.example_en: He bought new swimming trunks for the beach.

items.definition_en: A sports cap is a soft hat worn during sports.
items.example_en: He always wears a sports cap when running.

items.definition_en: A baseball cap is a soft cap with a rounded crown and a stiff bill.
items.example_en: She put on her baseball cap to keep the sun away.

items.definition_en: A tennis skirt is a light skirt worn for tennis.
items.example_en: Her tennis skirt is white and comfortable.

items.definition_en: A polo shirt is a short-sleeved shirt with a collar.
items.example_en: He wore a blue polo shirt for the match.

items.definition_en: A running top is a light shirt worn when running.
items.example_en: My running top dries quickly after sweating.

items.definition_en: A cycling jersey is a tight shirt worn for cycling.
items.example_en: He bought a new cycling jersey for his rides.

items.definition_en: Sports socks are special socks worn during exercise.
items.example_en: Sports socks help keep my feet dry.

items.definition_en: A headband is a band worn around the head to keep hair back.
items.example_en: She wears a headband when she plays tennis.

items.definition_en: A sweatband is a band worn to absorb sweat.
items.example_en: He had a sweatband on his wrist during the game.

items.definition_en: A sports vest is a sleeveless top for exercise or competition.
items.example_en: He wore a sports vest during the marathon.

items.definition_en: A hoodie is a casual jacket or sweatshirt with a hood.
items.example_en: She put on her hoodie before going outside.

items.definition_en: Leggings are tight pants usually worn for sports or exercise.
items.example_en: Her leggings are bright and comfortable.
